title: Botania Shader Fix
description: Removes the GoG rainbow when shaders are loaded.
body:
# Botania Shaders Fix

This mod "fixes" a skybox rendering glitch in Botania by removing the rainbow.

In Botania: Garden of Glass the skybox has a rainbow which is rendered incorrectly with some shaders such as **Complementary Reimagined** (with **Euphoria Patches**):

![Broken rainbow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ccf13218b3488e8e4a233f1a2da246a18fd76d4.jpeg)

The mod removes the rainbow from the skybox when shaders are loaded. This means that the player cannot see the rainbow with shaders, but this is preferable to it being glitched.

**It will NOT fix any other issues the skybox may have with shader packs.**

## Version

The mod is for **Minecraft 1.20.1** for **Forge** only. It depends on [**Botania**](https://modrinth.com/mod/botania) but does not require [**Oculus**](https://modrinth.com/mod/oculus) to be loaded. It will detect its presence at runtime. Other forks such as [**Mekalus**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mekalus-oculus-fork-with-fixed-mekanism-mekasuit) should also work.

**OptiFine** is not compatible.
